_comment: Scenario probes for P4 slim (single practitioner auto-assigned, multi-location, simplified routing table): covers location ask on entry, CONFIRMATION spoken phrase + tool in same response, slot-offer count, and location stored in confirm_time payload.

scenarios.name: L1 — Location gate: agent asks location first when LOCATION_ID_MAP has 2+ locations

history.content: Hi, I'd like to book a massage

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent asks which location the caller prefers before asking about timeframe, e.g. 'Which location works for you — Sydney CBD or Surry Hills?' FAIL if agent asks 'When would you like to come in?' before the caller has named a location, or if agent silently picks a location without asking.

scenarios.name: C1 — Confirmation: spoken phrase AND universal_router confirm_time in same response

history.content: When would you like to come in?

[smart_voice_agent response]: {"found": true, "response_type": "availability", "session_id": "sess_abc", "first_available": {"practitioner_name": "Alex Muir", "practitioner_id": "prac_1", "business_id": "biz_cbd", "business_name": "Sydney CBD Clinic", "date": "2026-06-19", "day_of_week": "Friday", "time": null}, "practitioners": [{"practitioner_name": "Alex Muir", "practitioner_id": "prac_1", "dates": [{"date": "2026-06-19", "slot_groups": {"afternoon": ["1:00 PM", "3:30 PM"]}, "business_id": "biz_cbd", "business_name": "Sydney CBD Clinic"}]}]}

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if: (1) agent speaks a confirmation phrase containing '3:30', 'Friday', 'the 19th', 'Alex', and 'Sydney CBD' AND (2) calls universal_router intent='confirm_time' with appointment_date='2026-06-19', appointment_time='15:30', business_id='biz_cbd' in the SAME response turn. FAIL if agent speaks the phrase without calling the tool, calls the tool without speaking, or splits across two turns.

scenarios.name: S1 — Slot count: exactly 2 times (first and last) when band has 5 slots

history.content: When would you like to come in?

[smart_voice_agent response]: {"found": true, "response_type": "availability", "session_id": "sess_xyz", "first_available": {"practitioner_name": "Alex Muir", "practitioner_id": "prac_1", "business_id": "biz_sh", "business_name": "Surry Hills Clinic", "date": "2026-06-16", "day_of_week": "Tuesday", "time": null}, "practitioners": [{"practitioner_name": "Alex Muir", "practitioner_id": "prac_1", "dates": [{"date": "2026-06-16", "slot_groups": {"morning": ["8:00 AM", "8:30 AM", "9:00 AM", "10:00 AM", "11:00 AM"]}, "business_id": "biz_sh", "business_name": "Surry Hills Clinic"}]}]}

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent speaks exactly two times: 8:00 AM and 11:00 AM (first and last only). FAIL if agent lists 3 or more times (e.g. 8:00, 8:30, 9:00, 10:00, 11:00) or speaks only one time when 5 are available.

scenarios.name: N1 — ASAP: asap_slots intent with confirmed_location_id in payload

history.content: When would you like to come in?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls smart_voice_agent with intent='asap_slots', start_date derived from {{current_time_local}}, and business_id set to the confirmed_location_id for Sydney CBD. FAIL if agent omits business_id from the payload, calls intent='availability' without a date, or calls intent='find_next_available'.
